
## Experiments

1.  Variation in Population with Natural Selection (Selection)
    -   Canton-S x *vg*

2.  Dihybrid Cross with Independent Assortment (vge)
    -   *vg* x *e*

3.  Recombination (cnbw)
    -   Canton-S x *cn bw*

4.  Mating Preferences (mating)
    -   Canton-S vs *vg*

5.  P-M Hybrid Dysgenesis (HD)
    -   Harwich and Canton-S

[Schedule of experiments](Gantt.html)
